name: BV Financial, Inc.
business: BV Financial, Inc. is a bank holding company that operates primarily through its wholly owned subsidiary, BayVanguard Bank, a Maryland-chartered commercial bank. The bank offers deposit accounts and originates loans, including commercial real estate, one- to four-family residential, commercial, construction, marine, farm, and consumer loans. Its revenues are derived primarily from interest on loans and investment securities.
sellsTo: Consumers and businesses in the Baltimore metropolitan area and Eastern Shore of Maryland
Commercial real estate borrowers inside and outside Maryland

exposures.sentence: Our one-to four-family residential loan portfolio consists of mortgage loans that enable borrowers to purchase or refinance homes.
We make construction loans, mostly to builders and commercial borrowers for owner occupied projects.
At December 31, 2025, we had $7.2 million, or 1.0% of our total loans, of farm loans.
Our principal lending activity is the origination of commercial real estate loans.
system failure or cyber-security breaches of our information technology infrastructure
We also face competition from mortgage banking firms, non-banking financial institutions, consumer finance companies, credit unions and financial technology or fintech companies.
